Who I Am

The real story.

  • 22 years old, working multiple jobs to pay off $53,189 in debt
  • Started at $71,000 — documenting every dollar publicly
  • Stacking income, refusing to spiral, building something real
  • Ran a 50K race while over $50K in debt — because why not
  • No finance degree. No trust fund. Just the grind and a camera
  • Building this in public so every person drowning in debt knows it's possible
  • Strength and honor — always
